prompts.name: mcp.instructions_v1
prompts.text:
Use x07.search_v1 for discovery across docs, skills, registry, and agent portal.
Check x07.ecosystem.status_v1 before using optional packs.
Prefer dedicated pkg/wasm/web-ui/device/app/platform tools over raw x07.exec_v1 when available.
Use x07.pkg.tree_v1 for dependency-closure graphs and x07.pkg.verify_v1 / x07.pkg.check_semver_v1 for package integrity checks.
For formal-verification or certification work, read x07://trust/formal-verification or use x07.doc_v1 before running commands.
Heavy tool results are bounded and file-backed; use x07.artifact_snippet_v1 or resources/read for deeper inspection.
On failures in code-edit loops: x07.context_pack_v1 -> x07.patch_apply_v1 -> rerun the relevant tool.

prompts.name: x07.agent.playbook_v1
prompts.text:
Preferred loop:
1) Discover with x07.search_v1 and use x07.pkg.tree_v1 / x07.pkg.provides_v1 when imports are unclear.
2) Probe environment with x07.ecosystem.status_v1 before optional wasm or lp operations.
3) For proof or certificate work, read x07://trust/formal-verification, then run x07 verify --prove, x07 trust profile check, x07 pkg attest-closure when required, and x07 trust certify through x07.exec_v1.
4) Run dedicated pack tools for wasm/web-ui/device/app/platform work; use x07.exec_v1 only for gaps.
5) Keep outputs bounded by inspecting report and artifact paths instead of dumping full logs.

prompts.name: x07.trust.playbook_v1
prompts.text:
Certification loop:
1) Read x07://trust/formal-verification or x07.doc_v1 before editing.
2) Run x07 verify --prove --entry <sym>.
3) Run x07 trust profile check --project x07.json --profile <profile.json> --entry <sym>.
4) If the profile is networked, run x07 pkg attest-closure --project x07.json --out arch/trust/dependency_closure.attest.json.
5) Run x07 trust capsule check when the profile requires capsule attestations.
6) Run x07 trust certify --project x07.json --profile <profile.json> --entry <sym> --out-dir target/cert and inspect the certificate artifacts instead of raw logs.

prompts.name: x07.ast.output_rules_v1
prompts.text:
When emitting X07 x07AST JSON:
- Output JSON only (no prose).
- Include schema_version.
- Keep patches minimal and deterministic.

prompts.name: x07.debug.loop_v1
prompts.text:
Debug loop:
check/test -> inspect bounded report/artifact paths -> context pack if code changes are needed -> patch -> recheck.
Prefer dedicated tool reports over raw stderr dumps.
